title: Mixed Grid Layout — AI Output Schema
description: The exact JSON structure Claude must return for the mixed-grid layout. No HTML. No CSS. Content only.

layout.description: Must always be 'mixed-grid' for this template.

title.description: Hero title. Space Grotesk, 32px, bold. 1–2 lines max. No punctuation at end. Make it specific and punchy.

subtitle.description: Short supporting line below title. 1–2 sentences, plain language. No jargon.

label.description: Eyebrow label above title — uppercase pill badge. E.g. 'STEP-BY-STEP GUIDE', 'DATA SNAPSHOT', 'HOW IT WORKS'. Keep short (2–5 words).

hero_icon.description: Any Icons8 icon name (lowercase, hyphenated). This is the large (96px) icon in the top-right circle. Choose one that visually anchors the whole topic. Icons8 has 100,000+ icons — pick the most visually precise name. The renderer falls back gracefully if a name doesn't exist.

stats.description: Exactly 3 stat blocks. Each has a number value, label, and icon. These sit in a row below the header.

number.description: The big number or value. E.g. '94%', '5', '~15', '$2M', '3×'. Short and impactful.

label.description: What the number means. E.g. 'Customer Satisfaction', 'Setup Steps', 'Faster Results'. 2–4 words.

icon.description: Any Icons8 icon name (lowercase, hyphenated) — contextually relevant to the stat meaning.

cards.description: Exactly 3 content cards. Each has an icon, title, and 3 bullet points. These form the main content grid.

icon.description: Icon for this card — must be specific to the card's topic, not generic.

title.description: Card title. 3–6 words. Action-oriented when possible. No ending punctuation.

bullets.description: Exactly 3 bullet points. Each is a short, concrete, scannable fact or instruction. Aim for 6–12 words each.

callout.description: A highlighted insight, pro tip, or key reminder — sits below the cards, above the footer.

title.description: Short label for the callout. E.g. 'Pro Tip', 'Key Insight', 'Remember', 'Watch Out'.

body.description: The callout message. 1–2 sentences. Highly practical. The single most important thing to remember.

footer_brand.description: Brand or source credit shown in footer. E.g. 'Infogr.ai', 'Company Name', 'Source: Report Title 2025'.

examples.title: How to Set Up Claude Cowork
examples.subtitle: A beginner-friendly guide — prerequisites, folder setup, and your first automated tasks
examples.label: STEP-BY-STEP GUIDE

cards.title: Create Your First Project
bullets: Open claude.ai and hit New Project
Give it a clear, descriptive name
Add a project instruction doc immediately

cards.title: Organise Your Folder Structure
bullets: Drop your SOPs into /Inputs as context

cards.title: Build Your Prompt Library
bullets: Save every winning prompt as a .txt file
Name prompts by task type, not by date
Iterate: track which prompts need refining

callout.title: Pro Tip
callout.body: Upload your SOPs as context docs before starting — Claude references them every session and produces far more accurate, on-brand outputs from day one.
